# Personal Data Protection Law

Jurisdiction: Oman
Region: OM
Citation: Personal Data Protection Law issued by Royal Decree No. 6/2022
Authority: Ministry of Transport, Communications and Information Technology
Source URL: https://www.mtcit.gov.om/ITAPortal/MediaCenter/NewsDetail.aspx?NID=9261
Topics: consent, notice_transparency, sensitive_data, data_subject_rights, cross_border_transfer, security_breach
Keywords: Oman Personal Data Protection Law, Royal Decree 6/2022, MTCIT

## Summary
Oman's personal data protection law governing processing, rights, controller duties, sensitive personal data, and cross-border transfers.

## Key compliance obligations
- Collect and process personal data under permitted bases and notices.
- Handle sensitive data and rights requests carefully.
- Assess transfer and security duties under implementing rules.
